nativePolicy: React Aria owns hover/focus delay grouping, hover persistence, Escape dismissal, portal positioning, collision/flip, and aria-describedby lifecycle.
Tooltip content is descriptive and noninteractive; actionable content belongs in Popover.
DisabledTrigger is a documented aria-disabled focusable adapter that suppresses activation while preserving tooltip access.
Touch has no long-press-only path and tooltip text cannot be essential.
